title: Structure-Guided Discovery of Selective Polo-Like Kinase 3 Inhibitors.
snippet: Polo-like kinases (PLKs) are a family of closely related serine/threonine kinases responsible for regulating cell cycle processes and proliferation. While PLK1 inhibitors have led to clinical candidates for oncology, the biological function of other PLKs is relatively unknown, in part, because there is a dearth of selective tool compounds. Herein we report....
